articles.title: US announces tariffs on dozens of trade partners over 'forced labour' imports
articles.summary: The tariffs target around 60 trading partners over claims they failed to properly stop forced labour.

articles.title: Oil prices hit $100 for the first time since May
articles.summary: The price of Brent crude rose more than 6% on Thursday as the war in the Middle East continues to escalate.

articles.title: Lawmakers push for AI 'kill switch' after OpenAI goes rogue
articles.summary: A new bill would let the US government order the shutdown of AI models that pose a public threat.

articles.title: Pubs cheer business rates relief while other firms 'left out in the cold'
articles.summary: Pubs welcomed the support package, while other High Street firms asked why they were left out.

articles.title: Southwest Airlines put Texas jet fuel on a boat to LA for the first time amid supply worries
articles.summary: Southwest hired a ship this spring to send fuel from Houston to Los Angeles in case of supply shortages.

articles.title: As Honda CR-V leads U.S. sales, automaker teases new American-built pickup truck
articles.summary: The future of the Ridgeline midsize pickup truck had been in flux, and the automaker said there will be a temporary production stoppage for the truck.

articles.title: 'The Odyssey' is cleaning up for Imax. Expect the momentum to continue
articles.summary: Nolan's "The Odyssey" is racking up box office dollars for Imax and fueling investor confidence that the company will reach record ticket sales in 2026.

articles.title: China's Geely to make EVs at Ford plant in Spain under new joint venture
articles.summary: Ford and Geely plan for the joint venture will begin operations in the first half of 2027, with the first new vehicles scheduled to roll off the line in 2028.
